heading: View Projects that have a Backup Compliance Policy Enabled
body:
Atlas CLI

To return the backup compliance policy for your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas backups compliancePolicy describe [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas backups compliancePolicy describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-backups-compliancePolicy-describe).

Atlas Administration API

Atlas UI
